labels: feature, enhancement

## Feature Proposal

### Goal
[What problem does this feature solve? How does it improve the language learning experience?]

### Desired Behavior
[Describe the feature components, screen layouts, or API services required]

### Architectural Impact
- [ ] New Database tables (updates DRD)
- [ ] New Backend Edge Functions (updates Edge specification)
- [ ] New UI/UX screens (updates Design system/flows)
- [ ] New API endpoints
- [ ] New state management (Riverpod providers/notifiers)

### Testing Requirements
- [ ] Unit tests for business logic
- [ ] Widget tests for UI components
- [ ] Golden tests for visual regression
- [ ] Integration tests for full flow
- [ ] Updated coverage targets

### Alternatives Considered
[Any alternative solutions or mock flows considered]

### Additional Context
[Add any other context, mockups, or references here]
